---
title: "Package Call Graph & Function Outline"
subtitle: "S3-aware map of functions, callers, clusters, hotspots"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(here)
# deps & outline
req <- c("devtools","codetools","igraph","tibble","dplyr","purrr",
         "tidyr","stringr","visNetwork","htmltools","rlang","DT")
to_install <- setdiff(req, rownames(installed.packages()))
if (length(to_install)) install.packages(to_install, quiet = TRUE)

source(here("tools/pkg_outline.R"))
out <- build_pkg_outline()

# helpers to build visNetwork from any nodes/edges subset
make_vis <- function(nodes, edges, title_suffix = "") {
  vn_nodes <- nodes |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      id = name, label = name,
      title = paste0(
        "<b>", htmltools::htmlEscape(name), "</b>",
        "<br/>kind: ", kind,
        "<br/>args: ", htmltools::htmlEscape(args),
        "<br/>exported: ", exported,
        "<br/>file: ", htmltools::htmlEscape(file),
        "<br/>lines: ", line_start, "-", line_end,
        "<br/>in/out: ", in_degree, "/", out_degree,
        "<br/>betweenness: ", sprintf("%.3f", betweenness),
        "<br/>cluster: ", cluster_id
      ),
      value = dplyr::if_else(kind == "external_generic", 1, pmax(1, in_degree + out_degree)),
      group = dplyr::case_when(
        kind == "external_generic" ~ "external_generic",
        exported ~ "exported",
        TRUE ~ "internal"
      )
    )

  vn_edges <- edges |>
    dplyr::rename(from = from, to = to) |>
    dplyr::mutate(dashes = type == "s3dispatch",
                  title  = ifelse(type == "s3dispatch", "S3 dispatch: generic → method", "call"))

  visNetwork::visNetwork(vn_nodes, vn_edges, height = "750px", width = "100%") |>
    visNetwork::visOptions(highlightNearest = TRUE, nodesIdSelection = TRUE) |>
    visNetwork::visPhysics(stabilization = TRUE, solver = "forceAtlas2Based") |>
    visNetwork::visLegend(addNodes = data.frame(
      label = c("exported", "internal", "external_generic"),
      shape = "dot", title = c("Exported fn", "Internal fn", "Generic from other pkg")
    ))
}

# exported-only subsets (keep external generics so dashed edges still make sense)
nodes_exp <- out$nodes |> dplyr::filter(exported %in% TRUE | kind == "external_generic")
edges_exp <- out$edges |> dplyr::filter(from %in% nodes_exp$name, to %in% nodes_exp$name)

# S3 by-class summary
s3_by_class <- if (nrow(out$s3)) {
  out$s3 |>
    dplyr::transmute(class, generic, method = method_name) |>
    dplyr::arrange(class, generic, method) |>
    dplyr::group_by(class) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_methods = dplyr::n(),
      generics = paste(unique(generic), collapse = ", "),
      methods = paste(method, collapse = ", "),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n_methods), class)
} else {
  tibble::tibble(class = character(), n_methods = integer(), generics = character(), methods = character())
}
```


```{r}
# Overview

nrow(out$nodes)

out$vis

DT::datatable(out$outline_by_file)

```
